properties.Test Case: Ensure deselecting a quiz answer in Edit doesn't leave residue red bar beside checkbox
properties.Steps: Ensure deselecting a quiz answer in Edit doesn't leave residue red bar beside checkbox

properties.Test Case: Change the header text, type in a couple lines-worth, play with size, check Publish:BloomPUB Preview.
properties.Steps: Change the header text, type in a couple lines-worth, play with size, check Publish:BloomPUB Preview.

properties.Test Case: In Edit, add a new Quiz page - Ensure the Quiz answer "cells" don't spill into the page number on a 16x9 Landscape or Portrait page, or a A5 page. Note: Decision in BL-9952 is we don't report overflow on Quiz pages. - Note also: we assume the user manages his/her text to not overflow (which is currently possible if you have multiple lines in the Question field). - A future improvement might allow scrolling, We just haven't got around to it (JH).
properties.Steps:
In Edit, add a new Quiz page
- Ensure the Quiz answer "cells" don't spill into the page number on a 16x9 Landscape or Portrait page, or a A5 page. Note: Decision in BL-9952 is we don't report overflow on Quiz pages. 
- Note also: we assume the user manages his/her text to not overflow (which is currently possible if you have multiple lines in the Question field). 
- A future improvement might allow scrolling,  We just haven't got around to it (JH).

properties.Test Case: Ensure Quiz answers expand to cover multiple lines in Edit and Publish:BloomPUB Preview.
properties.Steps: Ensure Quiz answers expand to cover multiple lines in Edit and Publish:BloomPUB Preview.

properties.Test Case: Make a new book and add a few Choose Word from Picture and Choose Picture from Word pages. Play. These are some things to verify: 1) requires enterprise ; 2) thumbnails look good (portrait or landscape) ; 3) letters with descenders don't cause overflow ; 4) BP preview randomizes (test by clicking on Refresh to rebuild BloomPUB) ; 5) changing book from portrait to landscape and vice versa works (reformats)
properties.Steps: Make a new book and add a few Choose Word from Picture and Choose Picture from Word pages. Play. These are some things to verify: 1) requires enterprise ; 2) thumbnails look good (portrait or landscape) ; 3) letters with descenders don't cause overflow ; 4) BP preview randomizes (test by clicking on Refresh to rebuild BloomPUB) ; 5) changing book from portrait to landscape and vice versa works (reformats)
